summary: Comprehensive frontend re-test of Dulce Cafe static landing page after the mobile-first rebuild + palette alignment + transparent-logo update. Tested mobile 390x844 and tablet 768x1024. All critical requirements pass: zero horizontal overflow, all sections render, gallery is tightly packed without dead space, menu tab filtering works, WhatsApp links correct, mobile menu toggle works, language toggle ES<->EN works, all 26 images load (0 broken), logo loads as transparent PNG (976x849), and zero console/page errors.

mobile_390x844.horizontal_overflow: PASS - documentElement.scrollWidth=390, innerWidth=390 (exact match, no overflow). After scrolling through every section, still 390/390.
mobile_390x844.hero_section: PASS - 'El auténtico sabor venezolano' headline renders; hero-menu-cta and hero-whatsapp-cta both present as stacked full-width buttons (350px each within 390px viewport); 3-col stats row shows 4.5/100%/flag; coffee composition with floating 'Cachitos' card visible.
mobile_390x844.sections_scrollable: PASS - all 5 sections (about-section h=1307, menu-section h=4894, gallery-section h=1561, reviews-section h=606, contact-section h=1110) render at full 390px width without breakage. Lenis smooth-scroll programmatic scrollTo worked.
mobile_390x844.gallery: PASS - 9 gallery-item-* tiles render in 2-col grid (170px+170px). Mixed-span tile sizes (350x250, 170x250, 170x120, 350x120, 160x235, etc.) due to grid-flow-dense + SPANS. All 9 images loaded (naturalWidth>0). No visible dead space; tiles are tightly packed via object-cover absolute inset-0.
mobile_390x844.menu_section: PASS - all 5 tabs (all/panaderia/pasteleria/salados/cafe) present in horizontally-scrollable row (last two render off-screen by design with overflow-x-auto). Filter clicks work: All=11, Panaderia=3, Cafe=2. menu-order-* links all use wa.me/50767453546 (verified sample href).
mobile_390x844.mobile_menu: PASS - mobile-menu-toggle opens drawer; 4 mobile-link-* (historia, menu, galeria, opiniones) with correct #anchor hrefs.
mobile_390x844.lang_toggle: PASS - clicking lang-toggle on mobile flips ES content to EN (verified 'auténtico' removed, 'authentic/venezuelan' content appears).
mobile_390x844.logo: PASS - /logo-dulce.png loads in navbar and footer, complete=true, naturalWidth=976, naturalHeight=849 (transparent PNG).
mobile_390x844.images: PASS - 26 total, 26 loaded, 0 broken after scrolling through full page.
mobile_390x844.console_and_page_errors: PASS - 0 console errors, 0 page errors. Only 2 informational warnings (Lenis position hint, THREE.Clock deprecation notice) - not blocking.

tablet_768x1024.horizontal_overflow: PASS - 768/768, no overflow before or after scrolling.
tablet_768x1024.sections: PASS - all 5 sections render at full 768px width.
tablet_768x1024.about_3_columns: PASS - About feature grid renders as 3 equal columns (210.66px each via sm:grid-cols-3).

critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking: Console warning 'container has non-static position' from a Lenis/Framer Motion interaction. Cosmetic only - no functional impact. Could be silenced by ensuring scroll-target containers have position: relative.
Non-blocking: 'THREE.Clock deprecated, use THREE.Timer' warning from the 3D coffee scene. Update three.js usage when convenient.
Observation: Hero CTAs measured 350px wide within 390px viewport (i.e., 20px gutters) - looks intentional and balanced.

Observation: Decorative blur divs and the testimonials marquee extend beyond viewport (expected) but are properly clipped by parent overflow-hidden containers, so no document-level horizontal overflow occurs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile-first responsive concerns from iteration 1 are resolved: no horizontal overflow at 390 or 768, gallery uses tight grid-flow-dense without dead space, transparent logo loads correctly, palette consistent. WhatsApp number wa.me/50767453546 used throughout menu-order links. If retest needed, focus on Lenis smooth scroll only - it requires window.__lenis.scrollTo(target,{immediate:true}) since it overrides native scroll.
